translation: 一块水晶，附魔后允许用户逃离试炼之路。

translation: 赫斯波里的粘性树皮。感觉它还活着。

translation: 一个闪烁着奇怪力量的沉重戒指。

translation: 一把神秘感的长柄武器。

translation: 一个曾经被伊莉迪尼斯本人使用的护符。

english: A sigil attuned to you with great power.
translation: 一个与你调谐的具有巨大力量的符印。

english: A power enhancing sigil not yet attuned to you.
translation: 一个尚未与你调谐的增强力量符印。

english: Every attack does +1 damage to the target.
translation: 每次攻击对目标造成 +1伤害。

english: Your melee accuracy is increased by +30 in stab, slash and crush. Additionally, upon a successful hit, you have a 30% chance for your next successful hit to deal +10 damage. There is a 10 second cooldown before this can reoccur. Does not work for special attacks.
translation: 你的近战命中率在刺击、挥砍和击碎中增加 +30。此外，成功命中后，你有30% 的几率使你的下一次成功命中造成 +10伤害。在此效果再次发生前有10秒冷却时间。不适用于战技。

english: Your ranged accuracy is increased by +20, and you have a 50% chance to save ammunition when using ranged weapons, except when throwing chinchompas.
translation: 你的远程命中率增加 +20，并且在使用远程武器时有50% 的几率节省弹药，除了投掷炸弹鼠时。

english: Your magic accuracy is increased by +40 and you have a 50% chance to save runes or staff charges when casting spells.
translation: 你的魔法命中率增加 +40，并且你在施放法术时有50% 的几率节省符石或法杖充能。

english: Your defence is increased by +50 for stab, slash, crush and ranged.
translation: 你的防御在刺击、挥砍、击碎和远程中增加 +50。

english: Barrows weapons get 40% more accuracy. Barrows gear never degrades, except upon death or after dropping the item. Barrows gear gains the effects of the amulet of the damned.
translation: 巴罗斯武器获得40% 额外命中率。巴罗斯装备永不磨损，除非死亡或丢弃。巴罗斯装备获得被诅咒护符的效果。

english: You gain 30% more accuracy in all styles against all monsters.
translation: 你对所有怪物的所有风格命中率增加30%。

english: You always gain triple resources from Mining, Fishing, Woodcutting or Farming. Does not work at Tithe Farm.
translation: 你总是从采矿、钓鱼、伐木或农业中获得三倍资源。在什一税农场无效。

english: You have a 5% chance not to consume potions when using them. Once the effect activates, it cannot be triggered again within 6 seconds.
translation: 你有5% 的几率在使用药水时不消耗它们。一旦效果激活，它在6秒内无法再次触发。

english: Clue scrolls drop 3x more often. You have a 75% chance for a clue scroll to return the reward casket after you complete a clue step for any tier. You can hold an unlimited amount of Scroll boxes.
translation: 线索卷轴掉落频率增加3倍。你有75% 的几率在完成任何等级的线索步骤后获得奖励箱。你可以持有无限数量的卷轴箱。

english: Activate the sigil to reduce the cost of your next special attack by 10 (the attack must cost more than 10 energy). This effect lasts for 12 seconds and has a 10 second cooldown.
translation: 激活符印以减少你下一次战技的消耗10点 (攻击必须消耗多于10点能量)。此效果持续12秒，并有10秒冷却时间。

english: On level 81-95 and 96+ Worlds: Activate the sigil to recoil 4 damage to your attacker for every hit you take. On level 3-60 and 61-80 worlds: Activate the sigil to recoil 2 damage to your attacker for every hit you take. The effect lasts for 25 seconds and has a 1 minute cooldown.
translation: 在81-95级和96+ 级世界：激活符印以对你受到的每次攻击反弹4点伤害给攻击者。在3-60级和61-80级世界：激活符印以对你受到的每次攻击反弹2点伤害给攻击者。效果持续25秒，并有1分钟冷却时间。

english: Upon dealing ranged damage, you have a 15% chance to cripple the target's movement. The effect deals 15 damage (33% less damage in 3-60 worlds) over the next 6 seconds and also drains a total of 15 run energy in that time. The damage is doubled against targets with less than 10% run energy. A target can only suffer from one crippling effect at a time.
translation: 造成远程伤害时，你有15% 的几率使目标的移动残废。效果在接下来的6秒内造成15点伤害 (在3-60级世界中伤害减少33%)，并在此期间总共消耗15点跑步值。对跑步值低于10% 的目标伤害翻倍。目标一次只能承受一个残废效果。

english: Upon dealing magic damage, you have a 15% chance to curse the target. The curse deals 18 damage (33% less damage in 3-60 worlds) over the next 6 seconds and also heals you for the same amount. A target can only be under the effect of one curse at a time.
translation: 造成魔法伤害时，你有15% 的几率诅咒目标。诅咒在接下来的6秒内造成18点伤害 (在3-60级世界中伤害减少33%)，并为你治疗同等数量。目标一次只能承受一个诅咒效果。

english: Choose your own Farming Contracts. Farming patches will grow instantly and never catch diseases. Does not work at Tithe Farm.
translation: 选择你自己的农业合约。种植地将瞬间生长且永远不会染病。在什一税农场无效。

english: Dropped bones are automatically buried. Ashes are automatically scattered. Prayer XP gained from these activities is increased by 200%.
translation: 掉落的骨头会自动埋葬。骨灰会自动撒播。从这些活动中获得的祈祷经验值增加200%。

english: Pay 45 Slayer Points to choose your own non-boss specific Slayer Task. Double the chance of a superior slayer monster appearing. Toggled on, you have a 25% chance for a Slayer Task kill to not count towards the task while still gaining you Slayer XP. Toggled off, 25% chance for a kill to count as 2. This Sigil does not stack with any bracelet effects.
translation: 支付45点杀戮点数以选择你自己的非Boss特定杀戮任务。高级杀戮目标出现的几率翻倍。开启时，你有25% 的几率使杀戮任务击杀不计入任务，同时仍获得杀戮经验。关闭时，25% 的几率使一次击杀算作2次。此符印不与任何手镯效果叠加。

english: Activate the sigil to guarantee 100% accuracy on your next special attack within the next 12 seconds. Once activated, the sigil has a 10 second cooldown.
translation: 激活符印以保证你在接下来12秒内的下一次战技100% 准确。一旦激活，符印有10秒冷却时间。

english: Decrease the amount of damage you take from attacks of a given combat style by 35% when using the correct protection prayer for that style. Increase the damage you take by protecting against the wrong combat style by 5%.
translation: 当使用该风格的正确保护祈祷时，减少你受到的该战斗风格攻击伤害的35%。若保护错误的战斗风格，则受到的伤害增加5%。

english: All attacks deal 10% more damage. This sigil does not stack with the Sigil of Rampage.
translation: 所有攻击造成10% 更多伤害。此符印不与狂暴符印叠加。

english: Alternating combat styles will increase your rampage count, up to a maximum of 2. Consecutive attacks with the same style will reset the counter. Each rampage count increases your damage and accuracy by 7%. Your rampage count will reset after not attacking for 6 seconds. This sigil does not stack with the Sigil of Aggression.
translation: 交替战斗风格将增加你的狂暴计数，最多2次。连续使用相同风格的攻击将重置计数器。每次狂暴计数增加你的伤害和命中率7%。你的狂暴计数将在6秒未攻击后重置。此符印不与侵略符印叠加。

english: Resources gathered from Mining, Fishing, Woodcutting and Farming will be automatically noted and placed in your inventory.
translation: 从采矿、钓鱼、伐木和农业收集的资源将自动转为票据并放入你的物品栏。

english: Engraved within, it reads "We stand alone - together".
translation: 刻在里面，上面写着''我们独自站立 - 在一起''。

translation: 保护你的腿 - 你最强大的逃跑工具之一。

translation: 一把神秘、沉重的剑。

translation: 一个古代法师的面具。

translation: 一件古代法师的长袍上衣。

english: The best pumpkin pie in Gielinor
translation: 基利诺尔最好的南瓜派

english: Only possible because of Brother Jered's hard work.
translation: 这全靠杰瑞德兄弟的辛勤付出才能实现。

english: A coupon for an advert in the Varrock Herald.
translation: 一张维洛克先驱报的广告优惠券。

english: To be worn on the head.
translation: 戴在头上。

english: A reversible jumper knitted lovingly by Iffie.
translation: 一件伊菲满怀爱意编织的双面毛衣。

english: Receive 5x the amount of reward points from most minigames and activities that reward points, such as Barbarian Assault, Tempoross, Mastering Mixology, Mage Training Arena and many more.
translation: 从大多数奖励点数的小游戏和活动中获得5倍奖励点数，如野蛮人突袭、 海灵、调配大师、魔法师训练竞技场等。

english: When casting high or low alchemy on a stack of items, the spell will automatically recast over time, until the stack is depleted or moved.
translation: 当对一堆物品施放高级炼金术或低级炼金术时，法术会自动随时间重新施放，直到物品耗尽或被移动为止。

english: You gain three chinchompas per successful chinchompa capture. Box traps catch chinchompas faster. Hunter catching will rarely fail.
translation: 每次成功捕捉炸弹鼠，你就能获得三只。箱式陷阱捕捉炸弹鼠的速度更快，狩猎捕捉很少失败。

english: All attacks from monsters do 25% less damage. The damage reduction effect does not stack with the Sigil of Titanium.
translation: 所有怪物攻击造成的伤害减少25%。伤害减免效果不与钛符印叠加。

english: When a Mark of Grace appears while training on a Rooftop Agility Course, 10,000 coins will appear alongside it. When handing in a pyramid top to Simon Templeton, receive 30,000 coins instead of 10,000 coins.
translation: 在屋顶敏捷训练场训练时出现优雅印记时，会同时出现10,000金币。向西蒙.坦普尔顿提交金字塔顶时，获得30,000金币而非10,000金币。

english: You have a 5% chance not to consume food when used. This effect has a 6 second cooldown.
translation: 使用食物时有5% 几率不消耗。此效果有6秒冷却时间。

english: You have a 5% chance to gain twice the number of Hitpoints from any food or potions consumed.
translation: 食用任何食物或药水时有5% 几率获得双倍生命值的效果。

english: You have a 50% chance to instantly cook fish that are caught while Fishing, granting Cooking XP regardless of level requirements.
translation: 钓鱼时有50% 几率立即煮熟捕获的鱼，无论等级要求如何都授予烹饪经验值。

english: Special attack regeneration will become 15 seconds per 10%. If a lightbearer ring is also equipped, special attack regeneration will become 10 seconds per 10%.
translation: 战技能量恢复速度变为每15秒恢复10%。如果同时装备光明使者戒指，战技能量恢复速度将变为每10秒恢复10%。

english: The max hits of thralls is increased by 5x. Thralls last for twice their duration.
translation: 仆从的最大命中提高5倍。仆从持续时间延长两倍。

english: You always gain twice the number of Prayer Points when consuming Prayer-restoring potions.
translation: 饮用祈祷恢复药水时获得双倍祈祷值。

english: All attacks from monsters do 60% less damage. The damage reduction effect does not stack with the Sigil of Resistance.
translation: 所有怪物攻击造成的伤害减少60%。伤害减免效果不与抵抗符印叠加。

english: Instead of receiving logs when chopping specific trees, you will receive the appropriate planks. Requires 50 coins per regular plank, 125 coins per oak plank, 250 coins per teak plank, and 700 coins per mahogany plank. Does not work in guarded areas or with the infernal axe.
translation: 砍伐特定树木时不会获得原木，而是获得相应的木板。每块普通木板需50金币，橡木木板需125金币，柚木木板需250金币，红木木板需700金币。在守卫区域或使用地狱斧时无效。

english: Completes the Fremennik storyline, up to and including Fremennik Exiles.
translation: 完成费明尼克故事线，包括费明尼克流亡者。

english: Completes the Elf storyline, up to and including Roving Elves.
translation: 完成精灵故事线，包括游荡的精灵。

english: Completes the Gnome storyline, up to and including Monkey Madness 2.
translation: 完成地精故事线，包括疯狂的猴子 II。

english: Completes the Mahjarrat storyline, up to and including Desert Treasure.
translation: 完成玛哈加特故事线，包括沙漠宝藏。

english: A magic rock! This one increases the chance of obtaining rare items. Teleportation will behave as if you were skulled.

english: Against players, gain 10% damage increase when using god spells. Flames of Zamorak has a 10% chance to burn. Claws of Guthix lowers your targets defence level equal to 50% of damage dealt. Saradomin Strike drains enemy prayer points by 30% of damage dealt.
translation: 对玩家使用神术时伤害提高10%。扎莫拉克之火有10% 几率造成灼烧效果。古斯之爪会降低目标防御力，数值等于造成伤害的50%。萨拉多明之击消耗敌人祈祷值，数值等于造成伤害的30%。

english: When killing an NPC, receive 10% special attack energy. The NPC must be within 15 tiles and you can't have been in PvP combat in the last 24 seconds.
translation: 击杀 NPC 时，获得10% 战技能量。NPC 必须在15格范围内，且你在过去24秒内未参与 PvP 战斗。

english: When you're within 10 tiles of your cannon and your cannon has 5 cannonballs or less, your cannon will automatically be reloaded, provided you have enough cannonballs.
translation: 当你位于大炮10格范围内且大炮剩余5发炮弹或更少时，只要有足够炮弹，大炮将自动装填。

english: Prayer does not drain naturally, but your prayer can still be affected by prayer drain effects like smite.
translation: 祈祷值不会自然流失，但仍会受到如祈祷：惩戒等效果的影响。

english: On failing to chop a tree or catch a fish, you will have a separate 50% chance to succeed. Resources from Woodcutting, Fishing and Farming will be doubled.
translation: 砍树或捕鱼失败时，你有额外的50% 几率成功。伐木、捕鱼和农业获得的资源将翻倍。

english: Looks like a good spot for a bank chest. Requires Construction level 21, 2 oak planks, 1 iron bar, 5 nails and a hammer.

english: An area specifically for the cleaning of fossil finds.

english: Looks like a good spot for a cleaning bench. Requires Construction level 5, 5 planks, 5 nails and a hammer.
translation: 看起来是放置清理台的好地方。需要5级建造等级、5块木板、5个钉子和一把锤子。

english: A river runs through it.
translation: 一条河流经其中。

english: Someone has marked a nice spot for a well. Requires Construction level 22, 2 oak planks, a rope, an empty bucket, 5 nails and a hammer.
translation: 有人标记了一个打井的好地方。需要22级建造等级、2块橡木板、一根绳子、一个空桶、5个钉子和一把锤子。

english: Looks like a good spot for some cooking facilities. Requires Construction level 24, 3 soft clay, 1 iron bar, 2 logs, a tinderbox and a hammer.
translation: 看起来是设置烹饪设施的好地方。需要24级建造等级、3块软粘土、1根铁条、2根原木、一个火绒盒和一把锤子。

english: Round and round it goes.
translation: 转啊转。

english: Looks like it's missing a wheel. Requires Construction level 28, 4 oak planks, 5 nails and a hammer.
translation: 看起来少了一个轮子。需要28级建造等级、4块橡木板、5个钉子和一把锤子。

english: A loom.
translation: 一台织布机。

english: Looks like I should finish assembling the loom. Requires Construction level 29, 2 oak planks, 5 nails, a rope and a hammer.
translation: 看起来我应该完成织布机的组装。需要29级建造等级、2块橡木板、5个钉子、一根绳子和一把锤子。

english: An open crate full of useful equipment for cleaning fossils.
translation: 一个敞开的板条箱，装满了清理化石的有用设备。

english: An ancient book of spells, the symbols show of a pendant with a ruby jewel.

english: A powerful tool sits upon the table.
translation: 一件强大的工具放在桌子上。

english: A broken glass chamber. Perhaps it has powers pertaining to life and death?

english: A pot of gold just weighting around.

english: A chain hangs here with an anchor on it.
translation: 一条链子挂在这里，上面有一个锚。

english: Leads back to the surface
translation: 通回地面

english: An anchor rope hangs here.
translation: 一根锚绳挂在这里。

english: Looks like a good place to anchor a drift net.
translation: 看起来是固定流网的好地方。

english: An empty drift net.

english: Looks like this net has some fish in it.

english: Can't go round it, can't go over it... I better go through it.

translation: 像一扇门，由海藻制成。其实更像窗帘。

english: I wonder where it goes?

english: Bowls have been banned from the depths, place your bowl here.
translation: 碗被禁止带入深处，把你的碗放在这里。

english: It's... sleeping?

english: Yep, certainly not your average chest.
translation: 是的，这绝对不是普通的箱子。

english: Is something living within?

english: Helps channel fossils or other items into the pool.
translation: 帮助将化石或其他物品导入池中。

english: Helps channel fossils or other items into the rinsing pool.
translation: 帮助将化石或其他物品导入冲洗池。

english: A bonus pool. For rinsing.

english: A strange mushroom.

english: A pile of ash.

english: No more ash here.

english: This crate rocks.

english: Crateaceous box of storage.

english: These rocks have conveniently formed a staircase.
translation: 这些岩石巧妙地形成了楼梯。

english: Phew! Smells awfully like Brimstone... Better keep my mouth closed.

english: It's attached.

english: Rich with minerals.
translation: 富含矿物质。

english: Hot and whirly.
translation: 又热又湍急。

english: Allows one to inspect the gas levels in the chamber below...

english: The heat distorts the light.

english: To block or not to block.
translation: 堵还是不堵。

english: A large rock.
translation: 一块大岩石。

english: A large rock was once here. Maybe it will be back soon.
translation: 这里曾经有一块大岩石。也许它很快就会回来。

english: Scorching gas leaks out.
translation: 灼热的气体泄漏出来。

english: Massive snake like leviathan.
translation: 巨大的蛇形利维坦。

english: This is made for supporting large fossils.
translation: 这是用来支撑大型化石的。

english: A bone of this size must belong to a Leviathan.

english: A partially completed fossil.

english: Looks like this case is lacking any contents at the moment.

english: Looks like there's no mush-room left in that case!

english: Crash, bang, wallop what a pitcher.
translation: 哗啦、砰、啪，好一个投球手。

english: Looks like there's not much-skroom left in that case!

english: It has terrible posture.

english: Looks past its eat by date.
translation: 看起来过了食用日期。

english: Something looks fishy.

english: All puffed up and no where to blow.
translation: 鼓鼓囊囊，没处吹气。

english: Talk about putting your foot in your mouth.
translation: 真是说错话了。

english: Eggtraordinary
translation: 蛋非凡响

english: Looks like someone finally came out of their shell.
translation: 看起来有人终于破壳而出了。

english: I wonder if it can still be carbon dated?
translation: 不知道还能不能进行碳定年？

english: It's a big, foot print.
translation: 这是一个大脚印。

english: Not mushroom in there.
translation: 里面没有蘑菇。

english: A shell of its former self.
translation: 已不复往日荣光。

english: The shape of this foot print must have belonged to a mythical animal...

english: This fossil appears to have a crack in it.
translation: 这个化石似乎有裂缝。

english: It's a drawing.
translation: 这是一幅画。

english: Two heads are better than one.
translation: 两个头比一个好。

english: Not so dangerous now!
translation: 现在不那么危险了！

english: Lobservably crusty.
translation: 明显硬邦邦的。

english: You make everything, gooooey.
translation: 你把一切都弄得黏糊糊的。

english: In life it was a goblin merfish but now it has no eyes.
translation: 生前它是哥布林美人鱼，但现在它没有眼睛了。

english: Two can play at this game.
translation: 这个游戏两个人可以玩。

english: I wonder if its feathers were slimy?
translation: 不知道它的羽毛是不是黏糊糊的？

english: Seems a bit withdrawn.
translation: 看起来有点退缩。

english: Some-fin jaw-some from the deep.
translation: 深海来的鳍——颚——令人惊叹。

english: Ain't half a fun guy.
translation: 真是个有趣的家伙。

english: A Paleontological nut case.
translation: 一个古生物学的怪人。

english: Why the long face?
translation: 为什么拉长着脸？

english: I don't want to know how this abomination came to be...
translation: 我不想知道这个怪物是怎么来的……

english: Did you know you can eat lava? But only once.
translation: 你知道你可以吃熔岩吗？但只能吃一次。

english: For getting a better look at the larger display.
translation: 为了更好地观看大型展柜。

english: Maybe I can climb through this?
translation: 也许我可以爬过去？

english: What's the worst that could happen?
translation: 最坏的情况会是什么？

english: There is nothing here to open it. Maybe it only opens from the inside?
translation: 这里没有什么能打开它。也许它只能从里面打开？

english: It's not any safer out there.
translation: 外面也不更安全。

english: A nice, green bush.
translation: 一丛漂亮的绿色灌木。

english: A neat little shed for storing logs.
translation: 一个整洁的小棚子，用于存放原木。

english: Where has all the rum gone?
translation: 所有的朗姆酒都去哪了？

english: A small hole in a hillock.
translation: 小山丘上的一个小洞。

english: Stairs leading to the upper floor.
translation: 通向上层的楼梯。

english: Stairs leading to the lower floor.
translation: 通向下层的楼梯。

english: A barrier that judges the worth of an adventurer.
translation: 一个评判冒险者价值的屏障。

english: A gateway to the Champions' Guild.
translation: 通往冠军公会的传送门。

english: For Jarvis, who died saving Gielinor.
translation: 献给为拯救基利诺尔而牺牲的贾维斯。

english: A gateway to the Heroes' Guild.
translation: 通往英雄公会的传送门。

english: A gateway to the Legends' Guild.

english: An altar adorned with strange figures.
translation: 一个装饰着奇怪人物的祭坛。

english: An old fountain... Or an Uhld fountain?
translation: 一个古老的喷泉……还是乌尔德喷泉？

english: A statue of a long forgotten hero of Uhld.
translation: 一尊早已被遗忘的乌尔德英雄雕像。

english: Books written by the great adventurers of Uhld.
translation: 乌尔德伟大冒险者所写的书籍。

english: See the sea. It's big and it's right in front of you, but someone might want a better view.
translation: 看海。它很大，就在你面前，但有人可能想要更好的视野。

english: Useful for lighting a fire.
translation: 用于生火。

english: The Guardian of Dusk keeps watch to the west.
translation: 黄昏守护者向西守望。

english: The Guardian of Dawn keeps watch to the east.
translation: 黎明守护者向东守望。

english: A staircase to the Slayer Tower's roof.
translation: 通往杀戮者之塔屋顶的楼梯。

english: A staircase back down to the Slayer Tower.
translation: 通回杀戮者之塔的楼梯。

english: Contains items from those who died on the roof.
translation: 装着在屋顶上死亡者的物品。

english: A small energy sphere. It's growing.
translation: 一个小型能量球，它正在增大。

english: A medium sized energy sphere. It's glowing with energy.
translation: 一个中型能量球，它散发着光芒。

english: A large energy sphere. It's bursting with energy.
translation: 一个大型能量球，它充满了能量。

english: To be struck in times of conflict.
translation: 在冲突时期被敲击。

english: A large display of the Grotesque Guardians atop the Slayer Tower Roof.
translation: 杀戮者之塔屋顶上怪诞守卫者的大型展柜。

english: Who knows what could be down here.
translation: 谁知道下面可能有什么。

english: I can use this to climb out of here.
translation: 我可以用这个爬出去。

english: Someone has tied a rope here.
translation: 有人在这里系了一根绳子。

english: I might be able to climb over these.
translation: 我也许能爬过这些。

english: It's a good job these are here.
translation: 幸好这些在这里。

english: An old chest.
translation: 一个旧箱子。

english: I wonder what's down here.
translation: 不知道下面有什么。

english: The way out of this place.
translation: 离开这个地方的路。

english: For someone important.
translation: 给某个重要人物的。

english: A statue of King Kharedst IV, the former ruler of Kourend.
translation: 库兰德王国前统治者卡雷德斯特四世国王的雕像。

english: A rare type of rose.

english: A gravestone engraved with a rose. A strange energy emanates here.
translation: 一块刻有玫瑰的墓碑。一股奇怪的能量从这里散发出来。

english: An old broken market stall, I wonder why it was abandoned?
translation: 一个破旧的集市摊位，不知道为什么被遗弃了？

english: A lumpy pile of sand.

english: Some dry tinder for firewood, carefully stored under this hut.

english: That's not going to be good for the hut.

english: Now it's wet and useless.

english: It banks your bits.
translation: 它存储你的物品。

english: It may lead to a vault full of pirate treasure? Interesting...

english: Walls would probably be better for security.
translation: 墙可能更安全。

english: Go up them.
translation: 上去。

english: Go down them.
translation: 下去。

english: Climb them.
translation: 攀爬它们。

english: Not overly secure... It must be a decoy.
translation: 不太安全……一定是个诱饵。

english: Apparently pirates have thrones now.
translation: 显然海盗现在有王座了。

english: Someone has been digging...
translation: 有人一直在挖……

english: Don't pirates threaten to make people walk the plank? It doesn't look so scary.
translation: 海盗不是威胁让人走跳板吗？看起来没那么可怕。

english: I can climb over these.
translation: 我可以爬过这些。

english: To deter any form of robbery.

english: A chair made from a stump.
translation: 一把用树桩制成的椅子。

english: Looks like Haris is prepared for everything.

english: Looks as if someone is up to no good.
translation: 看起来有人不怀好意。

english: Can they even climb this?

english: The vines look strong enough... for a human.

english: Probably hard to trip over this.

english: Fit for an ogre.

english: An ogre fire. Looks fierce.

english: I can get out here.
translation: 我可以从这里出去。

english: I can probably jump to that.
translation: 我大概能跳到那个上面。

english: A holy warrior. A dead one.
translation: 一个神圣的战士。一位逝者。

english: Shiny armour! Shame he's dead.
translation: 闪亮的盔甲！可惜他死了。

english: Shiny armour! Shame she's dead.
translation: 闪亮的盔甲！可惜她死了。

english: I don't think he'll be getting back up.
translation: 我想他不会站起来了。

english: I don't think she'll be getting back up.
translation: 我想她不会站起来了。

english: It looks magical.
translation: 它看起来有魔法。

english: I wonder what it says.
translation: 不知道上面写了什么。

english: Swampy.
translation: 沼泽般的。

english: Need a net? Here's Annette.
translation: 需要网吗？这是安妮特。

english: Someone's written a to-do list here.
translation: 有人在这里写了一个待办事项清单。

english: It's a rope.
translation: 这是一根绳子。

english: Some scattered pebbles.
translation: 一些散落的鹅卵石。

english: Looks like the Mannequin has protection.
translation: 看起来人体模型有保护。

english: An altar of the occult, imbued with ancient, cosmic and dark magic.
translation: 一个神秘祭坛，浸透着古老、宇宙和黑暗魔法。

english: Useful for chopping wood.
translation: 用于砍柴。

english: A source of pure water.
translation: 纯净水源。

english: A table adorned with a strange glass globe.
translation: 一张装饰着奇怪玻璃球的桌子。

english: What a lovely backdrop.
translation: 多么可爱的背景。

english: A peculiar arrangement of items.
translation: 奇特的物品摆放。

english: An iconic brazier.
translation: 一个标志性的火盆。

english: Where does it go? Perhaps a journey into the past?
translation: 它通向哪里？也许是回到过去的旅程？

english: Where does it go? Probably back to the party room.
translation: 它通向哪里？可能回到派对房间。

english: A rowdy rabble of goblins. The Goblin Invasion event came into the game on August 16th, 2013.
translation: 一群吵闹的哥布林。哥布林入侵事件于2013年8月16日加入游戏。

english: A display of Cerberus. This came into the game on August 27th, 2015.

english: A display of the Abyssal Sire. This came into the game on October 1st, 2015.

english: A display of the Grotesque Guardians. They came into the game on October 26th, 2017.

english: Master clue scrolls were added to the game on July 6th, 2016.
translation: 大师线索卷轴于2016年7月6日加入游戏。

english: Runite Minor, the player who designed the Motherlode Mine. Released on April 24th, 2014.
translation: Runite Minor，设计母岩矿坑的玩家。于2014年4月24日发布。

english: Raids I: Chambers of Xeric was released on January 5th, 2017.
translation: 突袭 I：泽里克圣所于2017年1月5日发布。

english: The Inferno was released on June 1st, 2017.
translation: 地狱于2017年6月1日发布。

english: The Godwars Dungeon was added to the game on October 16th, 2013.
translation: 神战地牢于2013年10月16日加入游戏。

english: The Corporeal Beast was added to the game on October 16th, 2014.
translation: 实体巨兽于2014年10月16日加入游戏。

english: The construction expansion was added on August 25th, 2016.
translation: 建造扩展于2016年8月25日加入。

english: The Wintertodt was released on September 8th, 2016.
translation: 冬将军于2016年9月8日发布。

english: Deadman mode was added on October 29th, 2015.
translation: 死亡模式于2015年10月29日加入。

english: The in-game world map was added to the game on May 25th, 2017.
translation: 游戏内世界地图于2017年5月25日加入游戏。

translation: 一张化石岛地图，于2017年9月7日加入游戏。

english: They can't trade others. By the way, this mode was added to the game on October 13th, 2014.
translation: 他们不能与他人交易，顺便说一下，此模式于2014年10月13日加入游戏。

english: A Hardcore Ironman succumbing to death. This mode was added to the game on November 10th, 2016.
translation: 一个硬核铁人模式玩家死亡。此模式于2016年11月10日加入游戏。

translation: 疯狂的猴子 II，OSRS 的第一个新任务，于2016年5月6日加入游戏。
